news.content: Updates on Poonamallee Bypass and the upcoming Chennai Metro Phase 2 terminal.

Farmers.title: PM-KISAN (Kisan Samman Nidhi)
Farmers.desc: An initiative by the Government of India providing minimum income support of ₹6,000 per year to all landholding farmer families.
Farmers.eligibility: All landholding farmers' families with cultivable landholding in their names.

Farmers.title: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
Farmers.desc: A comprehensive crop insurance scheme to provide financial support to farmers suffering crop loss/damage arising out of unforeseen events.
Farmers.eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in a notified area.

Students.title: Moovalur Ramamirtham Ammaiyar Higher Education Assurance Scheme
Students.desc: Also known as the 'Pudhumai Penn' scheme, it provides ₹1000/month to girls who studied in government schools from Class 6 to 12 until they complete their UG degree/diploma/ITI.
Students.eligibility: Girls who studied in TN Govt schools from 6th to 12th standard.

Students.title: National Scholarship Portal
Students.desc: A one-stop solution for multiple scholarship schemes provided by the Government of India for students across all levels of education.
Students.eligibility: Students from minority communities, SC/ST/OBC, and economically weaker sections.

Senior Citizens.title: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
Senior Citizens.desc: A non-contributory pension scheme that provides monthly income to senior citizens living below the poverty line.
Senior Citizens.eligibility: Age 60 years or above, belonging to BPL category.

Women.title: Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam
Women.desc: A flagship scheme of the Tamil Nadu government providing a monthly basic income of ₹1,000 to eligible women heads of households.
Women.eligibility: Women heads of families meeting income and landholding criteria.

Women.title: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
Women.desc: A maternity benefit program providing a cash incentive of ₹5,000 for pregnant women and lactating mothers for their first living child.
Women.eligibility: Pregnant women and lactating mothers for first child.

options.text: Solar street lights across main avenues
